name: Credit Rise Restoration LLC
description_short: Credit Restoration of Texas disputes inaccurate items on credit reports and offers debt settlement, identity theft restoration, and business credit building since 2007.
description_long:
Credit Restoration of Texas (CRTX) has operated since 2007 as a credit repair company serving thousands of clients nationwide. The company positions itself as a leader in the credit repair industry with claims of helping over 10,000 people improve their credit scores. According to their website, they maintain an A+ BBB rating, are registered and bonded, and offer 24/7 online client access to track repair progress.

The company offers six primary service categories: credit repair and score improvement, debt settlement and management, removal of erroneous credit information, identity theft restoration and protection, business credit building and funding access, and personal credit building for those starting from scratch. Their stated methodology involves analyzing client credit reports for non-compliance with current credit laws, then sending dispute letters and debt validation requests to relevant parties to remove inaccurate, obsolete, or unverifiable information.

CRTX distinguishes itself through claimed speed (results potentially visible within 45 days), a free consultation process, online 24/7 status tracking, and a stated "best guarantee in the industry." They also offer ancillary services including guidance on maintaining and maximizing credit scores after repair work is completed, and business-focused credit building without personal guarantees.

Like all credit repair companies, CRTX faces inherent industry constraints: the same dispute process they employ is available to consumers for free through credit bureaus, timeline expectations (90 days to 6 months) are lengthy, and their promotional claims ("80+ years of experience," "80+ people helped," "80+ 5 Star reviews," "80+ credit items fixed") appear to use placeholder formatting rather than verified metrics. No independent verification of their claimed results, pricing structure, or refund policies appears on the provided website content.
pros: 24/7 online access to track credit repair status in real-time with login credentials
Free credit analysis and free initial consultation before enrollment
Registered and bonded company with claimed A+ BBB rating
Operating since 2007 with stated experience of helping 10,000+ clients
Offers six distinct service lines beyond basic credit repair (debt settlement, identity theft, business credit, personal credit building)
Guided coaching on maintaining and maximizing credit scores post-repair
Claims potential results within 45 days, with most cases completed in 90 days to 6 months
cons: No transparent pricing structure, payment terms, or refund policy disclosed on website
Promotional metrics on homepage use placeholder formatting ("80+") rather than verified numbers, undermining credibility claims
Timeline expectations (90 days to 6 months) are lengthy and dependent on undefined individual credit profiles
No disclosure of what specific credit laws are used as basis for disputes or removal criteria
Same core disputing service is available free directly from credit bureaus without company involvement
best_for: Consumers with multiple inaccurate or unverifiable negative items on credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
Business owners needing to establish or rebuild business credit profiles separately from personal credit
Identity theft victims needing coordinated credit restoration and ongoing protection monitoring
Individuals overwhelmed by debt seeking settlement negotiation and management guidance alongside credit repair
diagnosis: Credit Restoration of Texas is appropriate for consumers with genuine errors or unverifiable negative items on their credit reports who prefer professional dispute management and want multi-service options including debt settlement and identity theft restoration. The primary caveat is that dispute letter services are freely available directly from credit bureaus, making the company's value dependent on its expertise and results track record—which the website does not substantiate with specific metrics, pricing, or verifiable customer outcomes.
services: Credit repair and credit score improvement through dispute letters
Removal of erroneous credit information through legal strategies
Identity theft restoration and identity protection
Business credit building and business funding access
Personal credit building from scratch or after setbacks
Credit report analysis and compliance review
Online 24/7 credit repair status tracking and monitoring
Post-repair credit maintenance and score maximization guidance
